mocks.description: Stub watercolor generator standing in for the real @ink/visuals git dependency. Returns a valid, self-contained placeholder SVG that varies its output per call (AC-UX-1) while honoring the pinned StyleToken. Introduced by S2 (dynamic-visuals-adapter-registry-stub).
mocks.interface_mocked: DYNAMIC_GENERATORS.watercolor(style, kind, render?) => string, as it will be satisfied by @ink/visuals's renderSVG API in Phase B
